photorealistic.suffix: photorealistic, high detail, 8k, sharp focus, professional photography
photorealistic.negative: cartoon, anime, painting, blurry, low quality, artificial

anime.suffix: anime style, cel shaded, vibrant colors, clean lines

oil-painting.suffix: oil painting, textured canvas, visible brushstrokes, fine art
oil-painting.negative: digital art, photography, flat colors, vector

pixel-art.suffix: pixel art, 16-bit, retro game style, clean pixels

watercolor.suffix: watercolor painting, soft edges, flowing colors, paper texture
watercolor.negative: digital art, sharp lines, photography, vector

cinematic.suffix: cinematic, dramatic lighting, film grain, shallow depth of field, movie still
cinematic.negative: cartoon, flat lighting, amateur, low quality

sketch.suffix: pencil sketch, hand drawn, graphite, detailed linework

cyberpunk.suffix: cyberpunk, neon lights, dark city, futuristic, rain, holographic
